task_scores.task_title: Phase 1 — Data model & backend (migration, process_type, weld_thresholds table, threshold service, GET/PUT API)
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Migration 1.2 could fail on existing DB if sessions table structure differs or backfill hits constraint; wrong down_revision breaks alembic chain.
task_scores.reasoning: Foundation for all threshold functionality; well-specified with full migration code and verification.

task_scores.task_title: Phase 2 — Wire thresholds into scoring (extract_features angle_target, score_session thresholds, active_threshold_spec in score API)
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Score API may return wrong active_threshold_spec if session.process_type is missing before migration backfill runs, or cache returns stale thresholds after PUT.
task_scores.reasoning: Core value prop — scores must reflect configured spec; depends on Phase 1.

task_scores.task_title: Phase 3 — Admin UI (types, API, AngleArcDiagram, layout, tabs/form with validation)
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Form allows warning > critical if frontend validation is bypassed; backend 422 mitigates but UX degrades.
task_scores.higher_leverage_alternative: Could ship tabs + angle-only form first (2h), defer thermal/amps/volts/heat_diss to a follow-up.
task_scores.reasoning: Admin UI is the primary configuration surface; directly enables 'calibrate to your spec' demo.

task_scores.task_title: Phase 4 — Micro-feedback & callouts (generateMicroFeedback thresholds, Replay + WelderReport + ScorePanel + demo, tests)
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Replay passes partial thresholds (angle only); thermal_symmetry still uses hardcoded 20/40 — admin changes to thermal thresholds won't affect micro-feedback.
task_scores.higher_leverage_alternative: Add thermal_symmetry fields to active_threshold_spec in Step 2.3 so Replay can pass full thresholds; ~0.5h extra.
task_scores.reasoning: Callouts deliver visibility; micro-feedback thermal gap weakens 'fully configured' story.

critical_issues: Step 4.2 builds thresholdsForMicroFeedback from active_threshold_spec but only angle_target/warning/critical — thermal_symmetry_warning_celsius, thermal_symmetry_critical_celsius, etc. are hardcoded (20, 40, 5, 1, 40). Admin edits to thermal/amps/volts/heat_diss thresholds will not affect micro-feedback.
Migration 1.2: down_revision '003_add_score_total' must match actual revision id in 003 file; if 003 uses different revision string, upgrade chain breaks.
minor_issues: PUT /api/thresholds/:weld_type returns get_all_thresholds() — refetch overhead; returning single updated threshold would suffice.
AngleArcDiagram Step 3.2: largeArc flag (angleTargetDegrees > 180) is dead — arc is 0 to angleTargetDegrees, which is always ≤90 per WeldTypeThresholds validation.
suggestions: Extend active_threshold_spec in Step 2.3 to include thermal_symmetry_warning_celsius, thermal_symmetry_critical_celsius, amps_stability_warning, volts_stability_warning, heat_diss_consistency so Replay and micro-feedback can pass full thresholds.
Add GET/PUT threshold API test before Phase 3 to catch integration issues early.
Validate down_revision against alembic history before running migration.
dependency_order: Phase 1 (Steps 1.1–1.7) must complete first. Phase 2 (2.1–2.3) and Phase 3 (3.1–3.4) can run in parallel after Phase 1; Phase 3 needs Step 1.5 (API) registered. Phase 4 depends on 2.3 (active_threshold_spec) and 3.1 (types); Steps 4.2–4.5 depend on 4.1.
premortem_top_risk: Migration 1.2 fails on production DB due to sessions table structure mismatch, constraint, or missing 003 revision; blocks entire plan.
goal_alignment_notes: All four phases serve the procurement calibration goal. Admin configures; scoring uses config; reports show spec. Phase 4 thermal gap is the main alignment shortfall — partial threshold passthrough undermines 'fully calibrated' narrative.
